nl: Show open orders for customer C1
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,"$O".CURRENCY,"$O".STATUS FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" WHERE "$O".CUSTOMER_ID = ? and "$O".STATUS = ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,"$O".CURRENCY,"$O".STATUS 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
WHERE "$O".CUSTOMER_ID = 'C1'
  AND "$O".STATUS = 'O' 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Total order amount per customer
sql: SELECT "$O".CUSTOMER_ID,sum("$O".AMOUNT) as TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" GROUP BY "$O".CUSTOMER_ID LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".CUSTOMER_ID,sum("$O".AMOUNT) as TOTAL_AMOUNT 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
GROUP BY "$O".CUSTOMER_ID 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Orders that are open or over 2000
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".STATUS,"$O".AMOUNT FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" WHERE ("$O".STATUS = ? or "$O".AMOUNT > ?) LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".STATUS,"$O".AMOUNT 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
WHERE ("$O".STATUS = 'O'
  OR "$O".AMOUNT > 2000) 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Customers who have at least one open order
sql: SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" WHERE (exists (SELECT 1 as "1" FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o" WHERE "$o".CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID and "$o".STATUS = ?)) LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" 
WHERE (exists (SELECT 1 as "1" 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o" 
WHERE "$o".CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID
  AND "$o".STATUS = 'O')) 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Customers who have never placed an order
sql: SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" WHERE (not exists (SELECT 1 as "1" FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o" WHERE "$o".CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID)) LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" 
WHERE (not exists (SELECT 1 as "1" 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o" 
WHERE "$o".CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID)) 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Second page of orders, 2 per page, ordered by ID
sql: SELECT "$O".ID as ID,"$O".AMOUNT FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID as ID,"$O".AMOUNT 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
ORDER BY ID ASC 
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2

nl: Loans with their sector description
sql: SELECT "$L".ID,"$L".SECTOR,sector.DESCRIPTION as sector_DESCRIPTION FROM capdemo_Loans as "$L" left JOIN capdemo_Sectors as sector ON sector.CODE = "$L".SECTOR LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$L".ID,"$L".SECTOR,sector.DESCRIPTION as sector_DESCRIPTION 
FROM capdemo_Loans as "$L" left JOIN capdemo_Sectors as sector ON sector.CODE = "$L".SECTOR 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Order amounts with their currency
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".AMOUNT,"$O".CURRENCY FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".AMOUNT,"$O".CURRENCY 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Loans with a debt-to-income ratio above the normal 0-50 range
sql: SELECT "$L".ID,"$L".DTI FROM capdemo_Loans as "$L" WHERE "$L".DTI > ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$L".ID,"$L".DTI 
FROM capdemo_Loans as "$L" 
WHERE "$L".DTI > 50 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Search customers for "acme"
sql: SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME,"$C".NOTES FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" WHERE (upper("$C".NAME) like ? or upper("$C".NOTES) like ?) LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME,"$C".NOTES 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" 
WHERE (upper("$C".NAME) like '%ACME%'
  OR upper("$C".NOTES) like '%ACME%') 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Orders with their status (raw code and business term)
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".STATUS FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".STATUS 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Customers' full names
sql: SELECT "$C".ID,"$C"."FIRST" || ? || "$C"."LAST" as "FULL" FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$C".ID,"$C"."FIRST" || ' ' || "$C"."LAST" as "FULL" 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Customers with more than 1 order
sql: SELECT "$O".CUSTOMER_ID,count("$O".ID) as ORDER_COUNT FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" GROUP BY "$O".CUSTOMER_ID HAVING count("$O".ID) > ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".CUSTOMER_ID,count("$O".ID) as ORDER_COUNT 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
GROUP BY "$O".CUSTOMER_ID 
HAVING count("$O".ID) > 1 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Orders placed in the last 60 days (relative to today)
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".ORDER_DATE FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" WHERE "$O".ORDER_DATE >= ? and "$O".ORDER_DATE <= ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".ORDER_DATE 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
WHERE "$O".ORDER_DATE >= '2026-04-23'
  AND "$O".ORDER_DATE <= '2026-06-22' 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Orders with their line items nested
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."PRODUCT"',PRODUCT,'$."QTY"',QTY)) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$i".PRODUCT,"$i".QTY FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."PRODUCT"',PRODUCT,'$."QTY"',QTY)) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$i".PRODUCT,"$i".QTY 
FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" 
WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Total amount of OPEN orders per customer (filtering inside the join, not the outer rows)
sql: SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME,sum(orders.AMOUNT) as OPEN_ORDERS_TOTAL FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" left JOIN capdemo_Orders as orders ON orders.CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID and orders.STATUS = ? GROUP BY "$C".ID,"$C".NAME LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$C".ID,"$C".NAME,sum(orders.AMOUNT) as OPEN_ORDERS_TOTAL 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$C" left JOIN capdemo_Orders as orders ON orders.CUSTOMER_ID = "$C".ID
  AND orders.STATUS = 'O' 
GROUP BY "$C".ID,"$C".NAME 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Rank each order by amount within its customer (highest first)
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,rank() over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".AMOUNT desc) as RANK_IN_CUSTOMER FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,rank() over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".AMOUNT desc) as RANK_IN_CUSTOMER 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Each customer's single largest order (top 1 per group)
sql: SELECT __select__2.ID,__select__2.CUSTOMER_ID,__select__2.AMOUNT,__select__2.RANK_IN_CUSTOMER FROM (SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,rank() over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".AMOUNT desc) as RANK_IN_CUSTOMER FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O") as __select__2 WHERE __select__2.RANK_IN_CUSTOMER = ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT __select__3.ID,__select__3.CUSTOMER_ID,__select__3.AMOUNT,__select__3.RANK_IN_CUSTOMER 
FROM (SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".AMOUNT,rank() over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".AMOUNT desc) as RANK_IN_CUSTOMER 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O") as __select__3 
WHERE __select__3.RANK_IN_CUSTOMER = 1 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Running total of order amount per customer, ordered by date
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".ORDER_DATE,"$O".AMOUNT,sum("$O".AMOUNT) over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".ORDER_DATE asc) as RUNNING_TOTAL FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,"$O".CUSTOMER_ID,"$O".ORDER_DATE,"$O".AMOUNT,sum("$O".AMOUNT) over (partition by "$O".CUSTOMER_ID order by "$O".ORDER_DATE asc) as RUNNING_TOTAL 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: What was Alice's role on 2026-02-15?
sql: SELECT "$W".EMPLOYEE,"$W".ROLE FROM capdemo_WorkAssignments as "$W" WHERE "$W".EMPLOYEE = ? and "$W".validFrom <= ? and "$W".validTo > ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$W".EMPLOYEE,"$W".ROLE 
FROM capdemo_WorkAssignments as "$W" 
WHERE "$W".EMPLOYEE = 'Alice'
  AND "$W".validFrom <= '2026-02-15'
  AND "$W".validTo > '2026-02-15' 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: What is Alice's current role?
sql: SELECT "$W".EMPLOYEE,"$W".ROLE FROM capdemo_WorkAssignments as "$W" WHERE "$W".EMPLOYEE = ? and "$W".validFrom <= ? and "$W".validTo > ? LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$W".EMPLOYEE,"$W".ROLE 
FROM capdemo_WorkAssignments as "$W" 
WHERE "$W".EMPLOYEE = 'Alice'
  AND "$W".validFrom <= '2026-06-22T05:40:12.932Z'
  AND "$W".validTo > '2026-06-22T05:40:12.932Z' 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Show me each order with its line items nested inside, and each line item with its product nested inside that — including the status text at both the item and product level
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS,'$."product"',product->'$')) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$i".ID,"$i".STATUS,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$p".ID,"$p".STATUS FROM capdemo_Products as "$p" WHERE "$p".ID = "$i".PRODUCT_ID LIMIT ?)) as product FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS,'$."product"',product->'$')) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$i".ID,"$i".STATUS,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$p".ID,"$p".STATUS 
FROM capdemo_Products as "$p" 
WHERE "$p".ID = "$i".PRODUCT_ID 
LIMIT 1)) as product 
FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" 
WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: Show me each order with its line items nested inside, and each line item with its product nested inside that — excluding the SECRET column at both the item and product level
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS,'$."product"',product->'$')) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$i".ID,"$i".STATUS,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."NAME"',NAME,'$."STATUS"',STATUS) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$p".ID,"$p".NAME,"$p".STATUS FROM capdemo_Products as "$p" WHERE "$p".ID = "$i".PRODUCT_ID LIMIT ?)) as product FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."STATUS"',STATUS,'$."product"',product->'$')) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$i".ID,"$i".STATUS,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."NAME"',NAME,'$."STATUS"',STATUS) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$p".ID,"$p".NAME,"$p".STATUS 
FROM capdemo_Products as "$p" 
WHERE "$p".ID = "$i".PRODUCT_ID 
LIMIT 1)) as product 
FROM capdemo_OrderItems as "$i" 
WHERE "$i".ORDER_ID = "$O".ID)) as items 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

nl: For each order, nest that order's customer inside it, and nest that customer's single largest order (by amount, among all of that customer's orders) inside the customer
sql: SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."NAME"',NAME,'$."orders"',orders->'$') as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$c".ID,"$c".NAME,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."AMOUNT"',AMOUNT)) as _json_ FROM (SELECT "$o2".ID,"$o2".AMOUNT FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o2" WHERE "$o2".CUSTOMER_ID = "$c".ID)) as orders FROM capdemo_Customers as "$c" WHERE "$c".ID = "$O".CUSTOMER_ID LIMIT ?)) as customer FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
readableSql:
SELECT "$O".ID,(SELECT json_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."NAME"',NAME,'$."orders"',orders->'$') as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$c".ID,"$c".NAME,(SELECT jsonb_group_array(jsonb_insert('{}','$."ID"',ID,'$."AMOUNT"',AMOUNT)) as _json_ 
FROM (SELECT "$o2".ID,"$o2".AMOUNT 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$o2" 
WHERE "$o2".CUSTOMER_ID = "$c".ID)) as orders 
FROM capdemo_Customers as "$c" 
WHERE "$c".ID = "$O".CUSTOMER_ID 
LIMIT 1)) as customer 
FROM capdemo_Orders as "$O" 
LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0
